description: Canonical deterministic corpus for promoting red proof, concurrency, protocol, and E2E failures into scrubbed replay artifacts.

scrub_rules.purpose: Remove wall-clock time while preserving event order.
Preserve hash presence without pinning unrelated artifact bytes.
Preserve the proof-command class without freezing local target paths.
Preserve the refusal reason without depending on swarm size.
Remove timing noise while keeping latency-bearing lines visible.

promote_when: A red rch proof names a first blocker that future agents are likely to hit again.
A no-mock E2E or protocol failure has enough stage logs to replay without contacting the original service.
A concurrency, lab, crashpack, or trace failure can be reduced to a deterministic seed or fixture.
do_not_promote_when: The only evidence is a prose summary without raw stage logs.
The replay requires live credentials, external services, or a peer-owned dirty checkout.
The scrubbed fixture would hide the failing file, lane, or decision class.

cases.title: RCH remote-required admission refusal is preserved as a replayable blocker
cases.raw_event_log:
2026-05-24T02:45:21.777777Z worker=ts2 command=RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_failure_corpus cargo test --test proof_runner_contract proof_status_dashboard source=/data/projects/asupersync/scripts/proof_runner.py digest=sha256:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa duration=115404ms
[RCH] local (no admissible workers: active_project_exclusion=2)
[RCH] remote required; refusing local fallback (no worker assigned)
first_failure file=/data/projects/asupersync/tests/proof_runner_contract.rs line=0 artifact=/tmp/failure-corpus/session-123.log elapsed=37ms
cases.expected_scrubbed_log:
[TIMESTAMP] worker=[WORKER] command=[RCH_COMMAND]
[RCH] local (no admissible workers: active_project_exclusion=[COUNT])
[RCH] remote required; refusing local fallback (no worker assigned)
first_failure file=[REPO]/tests/proof_runner_contract.rs line=0 artifact=[TMP] elapsed=[DURATION]

first_failure.summary: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 refused local fallback before the proof lane ran.

stage_logs.scrubbed_excerpt: [RCH] remote required; refusing local fallback (no worker assigned)

promotion_output.closeout_language: blocked-external: intended remote proof lane did not run because RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 refused local fallback; cite the refusal exactly and preserve the supplemental proof that did run.
